base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of castle_axe_static — a pickup_item from 1985 super mario bros. End-of-castle axe sprite — static. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: End-of-castle axe sprite — static; Mario walks into it to trigger Bowser-bridge-collapse sequence
